message:
feat(robot): extract routing_decision event builder and align backends output with schema

Move inline routing_decision and backends JSON construction from main.rs
into reusable helpers in robot.rs (routing_decision_value,
build_backends_report, backends_discovery_value). Add routing_decision
to the robot schema document with required fields and example. Bump
event type count to 12. Add tests for routing_decision contract and
backends command output. Apply rustfmt formatting fixes in conformance.rs
and orchestrator.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
